RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0009 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Grace Smith Date of Birth: 05/04/1981 SSN (tokenized): TKN-505193 Annual Income: $158,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $12,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Toronto Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN43643AL Tesla Civic 2019 ICE CPO 22,000 VIN29908AL Toyota Corolla 2016 ICE Used 19,000 Authorized Signature: Grace Smith
